calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Elder and Dependent Adult Abuse OSC & TRO Hearing.
Dept. 204, Judge Peter J. Busch, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sherry Sawyer #5976, Bailiff Deputy Guitron.
Plaintiff Jock CHing Chan present in pro per with Certified Cantonese Interpreter Edward Chu, were placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defednant Al Zhen Chen.
Proof of Service is in the file.
The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, Plaintiff's request for issuance of a restraining order is DENIED.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Continued To Aug-01-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: All parties were sworn prior to the commencement of the proceedings.

Appearances: Jock Chung Chan (Petitioner in Pro Per). Wei Chan (Son/Interpeter for Petitioner).

Proof of Service presented by Wei Chan is incompleted. Mr. Chan's Request to Continue Hearing is granted (order for the same signed in open court). The Request for Restraining Order was continued to August 1, 2012 at 1:30 p.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR#5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.
